channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Dow loses more than 500 points Friday as tech slumps and yields spike: Live updates
item.description: Stocks fell on Friday, bogged down by losses in technology stocks and a rise in U.S. Treasury yields.

item.title: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.

item.title: Trump went big on tech stocks in first quarter of 2026, new filings show
item.description: Trump bought shares of Amazon, Meta, Oracle, Broadcom, Motorola and Dell worth millions, new ethics disclosure filings show.

item.title: Trump says Xi agrees Iran must open strait, but no sign China will weigh in
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said Chinese President Xi Jinping had agreed Tehran must reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Cisco is the most overbought stock in the S&P 500. Here are the others.
item.description: Cisco was the most overbought stock in the S&P 500 this week, meaning its shares could be due for a pullback, according to a CNBC Pro screener.

item.title: Kevin Warsh comes into the Fed facing a big 'family fight' over cutting interest rates
item.description: With inflation spiking and Treasury yields surging, Warsh is likely to confront a Federal Open Market Committee in no mood to ease.

item.title: UAE says its decision to leave OPEC was a strategic economic move, not a political one
item.description: The United Arab Emirates, which joined OPEC in 1967, announced last month it was leaving the oil producer group on May 1.

item.title: The bond market is flashing a warning over Iran. A veteran of energy geopolitics explains the risk
item.description: Daleep Singh knows how energy and markets intersect. He sees trouble ahead.

item.title: Creator content made the main stage at TV's 'upfront' pitches — and not just for YouTube
item.description: In media companies' annual pitch to advertisers this week, creator content played a bigger role as a new category for reaching younger audiences.

item.title: Global oil stockpiles could hit record lows if Strait of Hormuz remains closed
item.description: The world's oil stockpiles could approach all-time lows by the end of May due to the Strait of Hormuz closure, according to UBS.

item.title: Meet the pilots flying Spirit Airlines' yellow jets to the desert
item.description: Special pilots have been moving Spirit's fleet of yellow jets to the desert.

item.title: Cerebras' blockbuster IPO boosts hype for SpaceX and OpenAI, but crowds out smaller players
item.description: After Cerebras popped in its market debut, all attention turns to SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic, which are already among the most valuable U.S. tech companies.

item.title: Jim Cramer fears SpaceX's IPO could be 'destructive' for the rest of market
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said he is growing concerned about the speculative nature in the IPO market.

item.title: Wall Street and Main Street face off next week with Nvidia, consumer earnings. Here's what's ahead
item.description: Stocks have been ripping higher thanks to a revival in enthusiasm around artificial intelligence, but without much follow through in other parts of the market.

item.title: This federal program trains older workers. The Trump administration wants to cut it
item.description: The Senior Community Service Employment Program provides older, low-income individuals with an opportunity to train for work. But its future is uncertain.

item.title: We traded our smartphones for flip phones for 4 days—and learned that ditching modern technology is harder than it sounds
item.description: Two CNBC Make It reporters used flip phones instead of smartphones for four days, as a digital detox experiment. Both say they'd do it again.

item.title: Stocks like Nvidia have accelerating 'momentum,' Goldman Sachs says
item.description: The firm says stocks like Nvidia are firing on all cylinders.

item.title: Tesla raises prices of Model Y cars in the US for the first time in two years
item.description: Tesla raised the prices of its Model Y ⁠cars in the United States on ​Saturday.

item.title: Berkshire's new CEO overhauls portfolio, dumping a slate of stocks
item.description: Berkshire Hathaway's equity portfolio got one of its biggest renovations ever during Greg Abel's first three months as the company's CEO.

item.title: A state banquet, selfies with Musk and Huang's noodle run: The spectacle of Trump's Beijing visit
item.description: The visit was full of friendly overtures, orchestrated pageantry, business dealmaking, and headline-grabbing sideshows.

item.title: Why J&J thinks its new psoriasis pill could be one of its biggest drugs ever
item.description: Investors are counting drugs like Icotyde to accelerate J&J's revenue growth rate.

item.title: How to plan a trip for medical tourism and the best resources
item.description: If you're seeking a medical procedure abroad, these resources can help.

item.title: Sundheim's D1 Capital bought several tech stocks last quarter — with one big exception
item.description: D1 Capital bought into a plethora of well-known technology stocks in the first quarter, with the exception of a social media giant.

item.title: Trump says China and Taiwan should 'both cool it'
item.description: President Donald Trump spoke about Taiwan after a two-day visit to China, where he said he discussed Iran, and trade deals with Chinese President Xi Jingping.

item.title: Russia's Putin to meet China's Xi in Beijing from May 19-20, Beijing and Moscow say
item.description: Putin's trip follows shortly after U.S. President Donald Trump's visit to Beijing.

item.title: Bill Ackman built Microsoft stake in first quarter during sell-off, betting on AI and cloud growth
item.description: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management has built a position in Microsoft, the billionaire hedge fund manager said Friday in a post on X.

item.title: What you need to know about Nvidia competitor Cerebras after wild IPO
item.description: Nvidia competitor Cerebras made a stunning debut on Wall Street Thursday, signaling unstoppable demand for AI chips. Here's how its chips compete with Nvidia's.

item.title: FDA shuffles top drug, biologics leaders in latest shakeup
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration is shuffling its top drug and biologics regulators, days after the departure of former commissioner Marty Makary.

item.title: Berkshire Hathaway returns to airlines with $2.6 billion stake in Delta Air Lines
item.description: The Omaha-based company built a position worth more than $2.6 billion, making Delta Berkshire's 14th-largest holding at the end of March.

item.title: Trump touted Palantir on Truth Social after buying the company's stock, records show
item.description: During the first three months of the year, Trump purchased between $630,000 and $247,008 worth of Palantir stock and sold at least $1.1 million.
